projectDescription: A Django REST Framework backend for managing gym reservations, training plans, and user attendance at Universidad Santa María.
keyFeatures: JWT-based authentication with role-based access control (Student, Trainer, Admin)
Automated weekly schedule generation for gym time blocks
Reservation system with capacity control and sports-selected student overflow
Penalization system: 3 no-shows triggers a 7-day booking block
Training plan management with interactive workout routines and PDF attachments
Physical assessment cards (FichaFisica) with trainer observations
Exercise catalog with muscle group categorization
Gym open/closed configuration with singleton pattern
publicApiSurface: POST /api/login/ — Obtain JWT access and refresh tokens
GET /api/usuarios/me/ — Get current user profile with physical assessment
GET /api/usuarios/buscar/?rol_usm={rut} — Search user by RUT (Admin only)
PATCH /api/usuarios/{id}/actualizar_permisos/ — Update user role and sports selection
GET /api/bloques/ — List available time blocks (auto-generated weekly)
POST /api/bloques/forzar_generacion/ — Force generate next week's blocks (Admin)
PATCH /api/bloques/{id}/modificar_bloque/ — Update block trainer or capacity
GET /api/bloques/{id}/reservas_hoy/ — List reservations for a block (Trainer/Admin)
GET /api/reservas/ — List reservations (own for students, all for trainers/admins)
PATCH /api/fichafisica/{id}/actualizar_nota/ — Update trainer notes on assessment
GET /api/planes/ — List training plans (own + global for students, all for trainers/admins)
POST /api/detallerutina/ — Add exercise detail to a plan (Trainer/Admin)
